@@ -1,17 +0,0 @@
-Manifest-Version: 1.0
-Bundle-ManifestVersion: 2
-Bundle-Name: JOverFlow Plug-in
-Bundle-SymbolicName: org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow
-Bundle-Version: 10.0.0.qualifier
-Bundle-Vendor: Oracle Corporation
-Require-Bundle: org.eclipse.core.runtime
-Bundle-RequiredExecutionEnvironment: JavaSE-21
-Export-Package: org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow,
- org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.descriptors,
- org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.heap.model,
- org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.heap.parser,
- org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.stats,
- org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.support,
- org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.util
-Import-Package: org.openjdk.jmc.common.io
-Automatic-Module-Name: org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow

@@ -1,12 +0,0 @@
-Manifest-Version: 1.0
-Bundle-ManifestVersion: 2
-Bundle-Name: JOverFlow Test
-Bundle-SymbolicName: org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.test;singleton:=true
-Bundle-Version: 10.0.0.qualifier
-Bundle-Vendor: Oracle Corporation
-Fragment-Host: org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow
-Bundle-RequiredExecutionEnvironment: JavaSE-21
-Bundle-ActivationPolicy: lazy
-Require-Bundle: org.junit
-Automatic-Module-Name: org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.test
-

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+Manifest-Version: 1.0
+Bundle-ManifestVersion: 2
+Bundle-Name: JOverFlow
+Bundle-SymbolicName: org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow
+Bundle-RequiredExecutionEnvironment: JavaSE-17
+Bundle-Version: 10.0.0.qualifier
+Bundle-Vendor: Oracle Corporation
+Require-Bundle: org.openjdk.jmc.common
+Export-Package: org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow,
+ org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.descriptors,
+ org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.heap.model,
+ org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.heap.parser,
+ org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.stats,
+ org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.support,
+ org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow.util
+Import-Package: org.openjdk.jmc.common.io
+Automatic-Module-Name: org.openjdk.jmc.joverflow
